meta.purpose: PR Split — Delete 'osm mcp' slop, make mcpcallback the sole IPC path, purge legacy file-polling, fix all bugs, enhance TUI, add integration tests. Flat sequential task list; NO priorities; NO estimates; ALL tasks MUST be completed.
meta.maintenance: This file is the single source of truth. Update task status immediately after every sub-task. Deviations must be logged within the plan. Read this file and WIP.md at session start before any work.

globalAlerts: CROSS-PLATFORM BUILD: The build MUST pass on Linux (ubuntu-latest), Windows (windows-latest), and macOS (macos-latest). CI matrix at .github/workflows/ci.yml. No exceptions.
BUILD SYSTEM: GNU Make is the build system. `make` runs build+lint+test. Use `gmake` on macOS if system make is BSD. All verification runs through Make targets.
DEADCODE POLICY: NEVER add ignores to .deadcodeignore. If deadcode reports an unused function, wire it up or delete it. Ignoring dead code is forbidden per AGENTS.md.

HANA DIRECTIVE (config.mk line 1): The ENTIRE existing 'osm mcp' command is SLOP and delivers ZERO VALUE. mcp.go, mcp_instance.go, and ALL associated test files MUST be DELETED. The classification/plan/resolution flow is strictly applicable within the process that manages Claude — i.e., the pr_split_script.js via osm:mcpcallback. The $(error) in config.mk MUST NOT be removed until after blueprint refinement is complete.
osm:mcpcallback is the SOLE IPC mechanism. All file-polling (pollForFile) and file-writing (mcpWriteResultFile) is legacy slop to be purged.
mandatoryDirectives: Read blueprint.json and WIP.md at the start of every session before doing any work.
Update task status in blueprint.json immediately after completing each sub-task.
The $(error) in config.mk must be removed in T37 AFTER the blueprint rewrite is verified.
Run `make` (full suite: build + lint + test) after every phase boundary.
Subagents spawned for implementation work must NOT self-review or run the Rule of Two.

statusSection.goalState: The osm pr-split system uses EXCLUSIVELY osm:mcpcallback for IPC. The 'osm mcp' and 'osm mcp-instance' commands are DELETED. mcp.go and all associated files are GONE. pollForFile is GONE. The legacy file-polling path is GONE. All validation lives in JS. All bugs from NOTES.md are fixed. TUI has streaming verification and per-branch status. Integration tests with real AI validate the spawn-switch-send-classify pipeline end-to-end. All three platforms are green.
statusSection.currentState: Build GREEN on macOS. T1-T36 complete (Phase 0-2). osm:mcp and osm:mcpcallback modules implemented and working. mcpcallback IPC wired as primary path in automatedSplit() with legacy fallback. New Category array classification schema implemented. ARCHITECTURAL PIVOT: Hana directive mandates full deletion of mcp.go and legacy path. Blueprint rewritten to reflect new architecture.

replanLog.trigger: Hana directive in config.mk line 1: entire osm mcp command is slop, must be deleted
replanLog.summary: FULL BLUEPRINT REWRITE. Old T37-T88 replaced with new sequence. The 'osm mcp' command, mcp.go, mcp_instance.go, mcpWriteResultFile, newMCPServer, pollForFile, and all Go-implemented MCP tool handlers are classified as pure slop and must be purged. mcpcallback is the sole IPC path.

T37: Remove $(error) blocker from config.mk
sequentialTasks.description: Remove the $(error THIS IS THE POLICE...) directive from config.mk line 1. Blueprint has been rewritten per Hana's directive.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: config.mk no longer starts with $(error). `make` runs successfully.

sequentialTasks.task: T38: Delete pollForFile function and ALL file-polling call sites
sequentialTasks.description: Remove from pr_split_script.js: (1) pollForFile definition (~line 2530), (2) ALL 5 legacy call sites in usingMCPCallbackIPC else-branches (~lines 2953, 3023, 3231, 3465, 1776), (3) pollForFile export from globalThis.prSplit (~line 4263), (4) the entire legacy else-branch from each usingMCPCallbackIPC conditional — keep only mcpcallback body, (5) usingMCPCallbackIPC variable itself.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Zero references to pollForFile in any JS file. The mcpcallback waitFor calls are the sole IPC. grep -r pollForFile returns nothing in internal/command/.

sequentialTasks.task: T39: Delete legacy mcpInstance path from ClaudeCodeExecutor.spawn()
sequentialTasks.description: Remove: (1) else-branch creating mcpInstance via this.cm.newMCPInstance() (~line 2105), (2) mkdir -p for result dir, (3) this.mcpInstance references throughout file, (4) resultDir from spawn() return value. Always use opts.mcpConfigPath from mcpcallback.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: spawn() ONLY uses mcpConfigPath. No mcpInstance creation. No resultDir. grep mcpInstance returns nothing in pr_split_script.js.

sequentialTasks.task: T40: Remove usingMCPCallbackIPC variable and all legacy conditionals
sequentialTasks.description: Remove usingMCPCallbackIPC declaration (~line 2875) and all if/else conditionals. Keep only mcpcallback body. If mcpcallback init fails, pipeline returns error (no silent fallback). Remove the mcpCallbackReady fallback log message.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: No references to usingMCPCallbackIPC. mcpcallback is the only path. Init failure = hard error.

sequentialTasks.task: T41: Add JS-side validation for classification data
sequentialTasks.description: Move validation from deleted mcp.go handlers to JS. Add validateClassification(categories, knownFiles) function: (1) array check, (2) each category has non-empty name/description/files, (3) no duplicate files across categories, (4) file paths recognizable.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: validateClassification() exists. Tests cover valid, empty array, duplicate files, missing fields.

sequentialTasks.task: T42: Add JS-side validation for split plan and resolution data
sequentialTasks.description: Add validateSplitPlan(stages) and validateResolution(resolution) functions. Plan: array check, each stage has name+files, no duplicate files. Resolution: has patches/commands/preExistingFailure.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Both functions exist and are tested.

sequentialTasks.task: T43: Migrate TestIntegration_AutoSplitMockMCP to mcpcallback IPC
sequentialTasks.description: Mock test (~pr_split_test.go:9178) uses legacy path. Migrate: (1) mock spawn() returns NO resultDir (forces mcpcallback), (2) add InjectToolData(toolName, jsonData) test helper to mcpcallback module, (3) use goroutine to inject classification/plan data through mcpcallback channel instead of pre-writing files.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Test passes using mcpcallback IPC. No pre-written JSON files. All existing assertions pass.

sequentialTasks.task: T44: Delete mcp.go entirely
sequentialTasks.description: Delete internal/command/mcp.go. Removes: MCPCommand, newMCPServer(), mcpWriteResultFile(), mcpBacktickFence(), all mcp*Input structs, all tool handler implementations.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: mcp.go does not exist. Build MAY not compile yet (dependents updated in T47-T49).

sequentialTasks.task: T45: Delete mcp_instance.go
sequentialTasks.description: Delete internal/command/mcp_instance.go.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: mcp_instance.go does not exist.

sequentialTasks.task: T46: Delete ALL mcp-related test files
sequentialTasks.description: Delete: mcp_test.go (~2800 lines), mcp_instance_test.go, mcp_fuzz_test.go, mcp_security_test.go, mcp_benchmark_test.go, mcp_parent_test.go, mcp_make_test.go.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All listed test files deleted.

sequentialTasks.task: T47: Remove MCP command registration from main.go
sequentialTasks.description: Remove from cmd/osm/main.go: (1) registry.Register(command.NewMCPCommand(...)) at ~line 59, (2) registry.Register(command.NewMCPInstanceCommand(...)) at ~line 60. Remove unused imports.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: main.go no longer references MCP commands. go vet passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T48: Update completion_command_test.go for removed MCP commands
sequentialTasks.description: Remove mcp and mcp-instance from expected command list (~line 702-708).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: completion_command_test.go passes without MCP commands in expectations.

sequentialTasks.task: T49: Remove claudemux.newMCPInstance and MCPInstance infrastructure
sequentialTasks.description: With legacy path deleted, claudemux MCPInstance type is dead code. Trace internal/builtin/claudemux/ for MCPInstance, newMCPInstance, configDir, setResultDir, writeConfigFile, configPath, close. Delete if only used by legacy path. Remove JS bindings.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: No MCPInstance in claudemux. deadcode reports no issues. Other claudemux functionality (PTY, mux) untouched.

sequentialTasks.task: T50: Delete pollForFile test infrastructure
sequentialTasks.description: Delete: pollForFileResult struct, parsePollForFileResult, TestPollForFile from pr_split_pipeline_test.go and pr_split_pty_unix_test.go.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: No test references pollForFile. deadcode passes.

sequentialTasks.task: T51: Run deadcode checker after full legacy removal
sequentialTasks.description: Run `make lint`. Massive deletion may have orphaned functions. Fix all findings.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: `make lint` passes. Zero deadcode. No .deadcodeignore additions.

sequentialTasks.task: T52: Build verification after mcp.go deletion chain
sequentialTasks.description: Run `make` on macOS. Critical verification that deletion chain compiles and tests pass.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: `make` passes on macOS. Zero failures.

sequentialTasks.task: T53: Fix verification skip bug — step() ignores allPassed:false
sequentialTasks.description: Root cause (T3): step() checks only result.error. Fix: verifySplits step sets error when allPassed is false.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Failed verification shows failure in TUI. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T54: Fix sendToHandle null handle at 3 unguarded call sites
sequentialTasks.description: Root cause (T4): Add null guard at ~lines 2781, 3016, 3220. Guard resolve step entrance.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All 4 sites guarded. Null handle returns error. Tests validate.

sequentialTasks.task: T55: Ensure TUI reflects quick verification runs
sequentialTasks.description: AutoSplitModel handles sub-100ms Running->Done. Step shows completion state.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Sub-100ms steps show ✓. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T56: Add logging for prompt sending and IPC failures
sequentialTasks.description: Comprehensive logging: sendToHandle, waitFor timeouts, connection failures, validation failures.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Failed IPC produces actionable logs. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T57: Write tests for bug fixes T53-T54
sequentialTasks.description: Tests for verification skip fix and sendToHandle null guard.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Both fixes verified by tests. All pass with -race.

sequentialTasks.task: T58: Pipeline timeout and watchdog
sequentialTasks.description: Per NOTES.md: --pipeline-timeout (120m), per-step timeout (60m), no-progress watchdog (15m).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Configurable timeouts. Watchdog detects stuck steps. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T59: Heartbeat monitoring for spawned Claude process
sequentialTasks.description: Register heartbeat tool in mcpcallback. Configurable timeout (5m). Warn then terminate.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Heartbeat timeout triggers warning/termination. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T60: Dependency-aware verification bailing
sequentialTasks.description: Per NOTES.md: failed base branch -> dependents skipped with reason. TUI icon (⊘).
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Dependents skipped. TUI shows reason. Test validates dependency chain.

sequentialTasks.task: T61: Fix misleading hash indicators in verification UI
sequentialTasks.description: Per NOTES.md: make hashes accurate or remove them.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Hash indicators accurate or removed.

sequentialTasks.task: T62: Verification target auto-discovery
sequentialTasks.description: Default to `make`. Auto-discover Makefile. Override via config/flag.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Default is `make`. Override works. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T63: Fix pre-existing failure handling
sequentialTasks.description: preExistingFailure branches accepted. Pipeline continues.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Pre-existing failures accepted. Test validates flow.

sequentialTasks.task: T64: Per-branch verification scoping
sequentialTasks.description: Scope to affected packages. Fallback to full make.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Verification scoped. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T65: Investigate exec.execv streaming
sequentialTasks.description: Analysis of exec.go for streaming capability. Design decision.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Analysis in WIP.md with recommendation.

sequentialTasks.task: T66: Implement exec.spawn streaming API
sequentialTasks.description: exec.spawn(cmd, args, {onStdout, onStderr, onExit}). Event loop safe.

sequentialTasks.task: T67: Tests for streaming exec
sequentialTasks.description: Real-time output, stderr, kill, cancel, exit code, concurrent spawns.

sequentialTasks.task: T68: AutoSplitModel streaming output support
sequentialTasks.description: AutoSplitStepOutputMsg. Update model and view for streaming lines.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: Streaming output visible in TUI. Test validates.

sequentialTasks.task: T69: Wire streaming exec into verifySplits
sequentialTasks.description: Use exec.spawn in verifySplit. Route to TUI.

sequentialTasks.task: T70: Per-branch verification status in TUI

sequentialTasks.acceptance: Per-branch status visible.

sequentialTasks.task: T73: Tests for TUI streaming and per-branch features

sequentialTasks.acceptance: All pass with -race.

sequentialTasks.task: T79: CHANGELOG.md entries

sequentialTasks.description: make on all 3 platforms. Integration tests. Grep for stale references.
sequentialTasks.acceptance: All green. Zero stale references. Zero test failures.

finalEnforcementProtocol: Cross-platform build MUST pass on ALL platforms — no exceptions.
NEVER add to .deadcodeignore — wire up or delete.
No AI Slop — the osm mcp command was slop and it was DELETED.
Rule of Two before any commit.
The blueprint is the single source of truth.
